outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump vows to sink Iranian ships approaching a U.S. blockade of Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: NPR covers Pope Leo XIV brushes off Trump criticism, continues peace calls. Vatican-US tensions escalate over Iran war.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Trump warns Iran as US military blockade on Iranian ports takes effect
outlets.summary: CNN covers CENTCOM blockade in effect, Trump 'eliminate' threat, China weapons intel, Erdogan war crimes accusation, Guterres 'wider war' warning.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US blockade of Iranian ports begins Monday, CENTCOM confirms
outlets.summary: Fox covers Iran's president Pezeshkian says deal still possible if US abandons 'totalitarianism.' Live updates on blockade and Iran response.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump threatens Iranian ships as the US imposes blockade on ports
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump 'eliminate' threat. Gen. Keane warns Iran 'overplayed their hand.' Iran embassy posts AI-generated pirate meme of Trump/Vance/Hegseth.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US military threatens to blockade all Iranian ports starting on Monday
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Day 45 liveblog: US blockade in effect, Hezbollah rejects Israel talks, Araghchi 'zero lessons', China arms intel.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Guterres warns world 'on the edge of a wider war' as blockade takes effect
outlets.summary: BBC covers UN chief's stark warning of wider war. IMF 'no return to normal.' France/UK planning defensive Hormuz mission. Germany slashes fuel taxes.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu touts achievements while JD Vance faces stalled Iran talks
outlets.summary: JPost covers Netanyahu Holocaust Day speech, backs blockade. Turkey war crimes accusations. Hezbollah Qassem: talks 'pointless.'

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: After talks fail, IDF planning for return to war, Trump mulls strikes on Iran
outlets.summary: IDF Chief Zamir orders readiness. IAF 150 strikes on Lebanon. Home Front adjusts restrictions. France/UK Hormuz conference. Germany fuel tax cut.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: IRGC warns deadly whirlpool for enemies at Hormuz
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Hezbollah 43 operations on Israeli targets. IRGC warns of 'new forms of warfare' and unknown capabilities. Pezeshkian condemns Trump insult to Pope.

outlets.name: Xinhua/Iran
outlets.headline: US proposed 20-year enrichment halt as softened demand
outlets.summary: Xinhua covers US softened nuclear demand (20-year halt vs permanent ban). Araghchi 'inches away' from deal. Iran framing: US maximalism killed negotiations.
